messages.content:
_______________ is generally used to purchase assets, like building, machinery and office equipment, and it matures in more than one year. 

Select one:

A.
Short term debt

B.
Long term debt

C.
Trade credits

D.
Interest-based sources
B. Long term debt

A customer profile in the value proposition canvas should has 3 segments, which are _________________, _________________ and _________________.

Select one:

A.
Benefits, experience, functions

B.
Gains, pains, customer jobs

C.
Gain creators, pain relievers, products and services

D.
Needs, challenges, performance
B. Gains, pains, customer jobs

_______________ is a method to generate as many ideas as possible in a short period of time for the business ideas.

Select one:

A.
Survey

B.
Questionnaire

C.
Focus group

D.
Brainstorming
D. Brainstorming

_______________ is a formal written document containing business goals, the methods on how these goals can be attained, and the time frame within which these goals need to be achieved. 

Select one:

A.
Strategic plan

B.
Business plan

C.
Marketing plan

D.
Company profile
B. Business plan

_________________ refers to the target people / organizations that are offering value proposition – divided based on demographics, behaviour, geographical or multidimensional. 

Select one:

A.
Customer segments

B.
Customer satisfaction

C.
Customer relationship

D.
Key partners
A. Customer segments

The components of creativity are _________________. 

Select one:

A.
Lateral thinking, mind mapping, and creative thinking


B.
Knowledge, creative thinking skills, and motivation


C.
Knowledge, innovative thinking skills, and encouragement


D.
Creative thinking skills, and self-motivation
B. Knowledge, creative thinking skills, and motivation

_______________ is a sign which distinguishes the goods and services of one trader from those of another. 

Select one:

A.
Trade secret

B.
Trade mark

C.
Copyright

D.
Patent
B. Trade mark

_______________ is used to evaluate competitors by placing them in strategic groups according to how directly they compete for a share of the customer’s dollars and cents.

Select one:

A.
Customer Analysis

B.
Marketing Analysis

C.
Competitor Analysis

D.
Strategy Analysis
C. Competitor Analysis

_______________ is about efforts taken by the company to develop and maintain good relationship with the public and to ensure good favourable public image of the business. 


Select one:

A.
Advertising

B.
Publicity

C.
Personal selling

D.
Sales promotion
B. Publicity

Why a business plan is important?

Select one:

A.
To raise money for the business


B.
To maintain a competitive advantage


C.
To identify potential opportunities


D.
To assist entrepreneurs market and sell products

A. To raise money for the business. 

A business plan is necessary not only to get startup funds but also to encourage you to focus on the critical aspects of your business. The business plan aids you in comprehending your industry, your competition, and your consumer base. It assists you in pinpointing potential areas for expansion and avoiding any pitfalls. A business plan motivates you to think about your objectives while providing a framework for planning how you want to achieve those objectives.

_______________ can have a minimum of one director, one shareholder and a maximum of 50 shareholders.

Select one:

A.
Public limited company

B.
Private limited company

C.
Sole proprietorship

D.
Partnership
B. Private limited company

Which of the following(s) is/are interactive marketing? 

Select one:

A.
Radio and TV advertising

B.
Media planning

C.
Email (list building / broadcast)

D.
Direct sales

C. Email (list building / broadcast) 

Interactive marketing is essentially two-way communication – a conversation between the business and the customer. The customer has the opportunity to engage and interact with the business in a meaningful way. Email marketing, social media advertising, live chat, and instant messaging are all examples of interactive marketing. Radio and TV advertising, media planning, and direct sales are not interactive marketing.
